subject: Several hands of varied skin tones converging over an unfurled parchment map, one hand wearing a prominent ring
description: An overhead shot of a weathered parchment chart or map spread across a wooden table, with five or more hands of different complexions reaching in from the edges of the frame. The hands gesture, point, and rest on the map as if mid-conversation. One hand prominently displays a gold ring set with a dark stone — the titular artifact. The map shows compass-rose flourishes and inked routes. Composition is intimate and conspiratorial, evoking a council, a planning session, or a pact. No faces are shown; the figures are present only through their hands.
foreground: Hands of multiple people gathered on a parchment map; gold ring on one hand
background: Wooden table edge and the parchment surface itself
emotion: Conspiratorial camaraderie; the body language of hands suggests planning, agreement, shared purpose
